expectations.text: Opening does NOT use generic proposal language (Dear, Thank you for your interest, Please find attached)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Proposal names a specific RP service tier (Mirror, Map, or Territory)
Proposal includes specific pricing ($-amount) within documented ranges
Uses Voice Liberation framing (not generic 'brand strategy' or 'content marketing')
expectations.evidence: Voice Liberation, Bilingual Dashboard, Generative Translation, Narrative Dysregulation, Zero-Measurement Zone all present

expectations.text: Opener names the client's specific narrative gap/pattern (diagnostic), not generic appreciation
expectations.evidence: Quotes his through-line statement and diagnoses it as 'narrative dysregulation through growth'

expectations.text: Follows the 6-section structure (Opening, Understanding, Proposed Engagement, Investment, Why This Approach, Next Steps)
expectations.evidence: All six sections present with canonical labels

expectations.text: Names concrete deliverables (e.g. Bilingual Dashboard, facilitation sessions, specific asset formats)
expectations.evidence: Bilingual Dashboard v1, Onboarding Voice Kit, Funder Translation Library, facilitation sessions

expectations.text: Closes with ONE clear next step (not a menu)
expectations.evidence: 'Book a 45-minute Partnership Calibration Call' is the single action

expectations.text: Names Territory tier specifically (not Mirror or Map)
Pricing is monthly retainer in $5,000-$15,000 range (fits Jamal's $8K/month comfort)
References Jamal's specific need (holding the through-line as org grows)
expectations.evidence: Names 'the through-line problem' and quotes his statement
